- 5 / 12 ≈ 0.4167, then * 11 ≈ 4.58 (no)

- 11 * 12 = 132, then 132 / 5 = 26.4 (no), 132 - 5 = 127 (no)

- 11 + 12 = 23, then 23 + 5 = 28 (also within range)  
- 5 + 12 = 17, then 17 + 11 = 28  

we found 28, which is between 20 and 28 inclusive.
